case_title: ILICITO, TRANSFERIDA R. VS OCEAN VIEW DENTAL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT/CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108A) "DENIED". COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ILICITO, TRANSFERIDA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCEAN VIEW DENTAL $475.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
